selection_class_note: Selected on IS-only statistics (sandbox screens + marginal-contribution gate, all <= 2020-12-31). 2021-2026 is UNBURNED by our own numbers. NOT an oos_informed_backfill (unlike the Phase-6/7 87). Residual caveat: literature-informed selection — the source papers observed post-2020 data (arXiv:2505.20608 sampled A-shares 1995-2024).

funnel.screen: eval_arxiv_d1d4.py (raw + size-neut RankIC/ICIR, fwd 5/20d, IS <= 2020-12-31) + arxiv_d4cov masked variants
funnel.marginal_gate: eval_arxiv_marginal_test.py vs the cached 31-factor book (combined ICIR 0.791 full / 0.69-0.82 overlap windows); verdicts in workspace/outputs/idea_sourcing_arxiv/arxiv_marginal_test.json

dropped.D2_entire_direction: flow_lg_net (REDUNDANT, hypothesis fails), flow_sm_net (reversal repackaged, corr 0.79, inc +0.013)
dropped.behav_cost_disp: low corr 0.55 but inc +0.008 below bar

lifecycle_gate.live_run_note: First live attempt failed with a TRANSIENT all-false field-eligibility (fail-closed behavior; standalone reproduction immediately after showed all 5 eligible, violations empty). Deleted the failed run dir and re-ran clean; verdicts bit-identical to the temp run.
lifecycle_gate.gate_decision: approved (drive_gates_arxiv_d1d4.py — batch-specific honest concern evidence, NOT the phase6 oos_informed text)

next_gate: candidate -> approved requires the SEPARATE single-shot sealed-OOS path (FrozenSelectionSet seal-key). 2021-2026 remains unburned by our own statistics for these 5; spend deliberately and note the literature-informed caveat in the frozen-set identity.
